name: Upper Tana Catchment Forest Protection
notes: Mau Complex-scale programme for Tana headwaters. 18000 ha targeted. 7400 ha under active protection. Charcoal trade from forest margins continues. Community livelihood alternatives underfunded.

name: Embu-Tharaka Nithi River Coordination
notes: Thiba and Rupingazi rivers cross county boundaries. Joint flood management framework drafted 2020. Not signed. Political relationship between the two counties is the primary barrier.

name: Embu Town Drainage Upgrade
blocking_factor: Budget absorption and staff capacity in county engineering
notes: Design complete 2020. Phase 1 procurement delayed by staff changes in county engineering department. Currently under procurement 2023. Main CBD drain capacity is 40% of design requirement.

name: Mt Kenya Glacial Melt Monitoring
blocking_factor: Monitoring findings not integrated into county flood planning
notes: Monitoring programme established. Glacial retreat documented. Downstream flood timing shifts identified. Not integrated into Embu or Kirinyaga county flood planning calendars.
